creator: Smithsonian Institution. Board of Regents
description: Book digitized by Google and uploaded to the Internet Archive by user tpb.
Includes the Institutions Report of the secretary

Memoir of Sir John Frederick William Herschel / N.S. Dodge -- Joseph Fourier: biography / M. Arago -- On Professor Thomas Graham's scientific work / William Odling -- On the relation of the physical sciences to science in general / Herman Helmholtz -- Alternate generation and parthenogenesis in the animal kingdom / G.A. Kornhuber -- On the present state of our knowledge of cryptogamous plants / Heinrich Wilhelm Reichardt -- Recent researches on the secular variations of the planetary orbits / John N. Stockwell -- On some methods of interpolation applicable to the graduation of irregular series, such as tables of mortality, &c., &c. / Erastus L. De Forest -- Report on the transactions of the Society of Physics and Natural history, of Geneva, from June, 1870, to June, 1871 / M. Henri De Saussure -- Expedition toward the North Pole: instructions to Captain Hall / G.M. Robeson -- Ethnology: Indian mounds near Fort Wadsworth, Dakota Territory / A.J. Comfort -- Antiquities on the Cache La Poudre River, Weld County, Colorado Territory / Edward S. Berthoud -- Antiquities in New Mexico / W.B. Lyon -- Antiquities in Lenoir County, North Carolina / J. Mason Spainhour -- Account of the old Indian village Kushkushkee, near Newcastle, Pennsylvania / E.M. McConnell -- The Pima Indians of Arizona / F.E. Grossmann -- Indian mode of making arrow-heads and obtaining fire : extract of a letter from General George Crook -- Ancient mound, near Lexington, Kentucky / Robert Peter -- Shell heap in Georgia / D. Brown -- Remarks on an ancient relic of Maya sculpture / Arthur Schott -- Ancient history of North America / M. Much -- On the language of the Dakota or Sioux Indians / F.L.O. Roehrig -- Meteorology
